tools.name: email_health
tools.description: Check the health of the service.

tools.name: list_emails
tools.description: List emails in a folder with pagination support.

tools.name: get_email_by_id
tools.description: Get an email by its unique ID.

tools.name: get_email_by_index
tools.description: Get an email by its index position in a folder.

tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Send an email to the specified recipients.

tools.name: reply_to_email
tools.description: Reply to an existing email.

tools.name: forward_email
tools.description: Forward an existing email to new recipients.

tools.name: move_email
tools.description: Move an email from one folder to another.

tools.name: delete_email
tools.description: Delete an email by moving it to the TRASH folder.

tools.name: search_emails
tools.description: Search for emails in a folder based on a query string.

tools.name: show_data
tools.description: Show raw email data as JSON.

tools.name: list_jmap_emails
tools.description: List emails in RFC8621 JMAP format.

tools.name: get_jmap_email
tools.description: Get single email in RFC8621 JMAP format.

tools.name: set_email_keywords
tools.description: Update email keywords/flags.

tools.name: list_mailboxes
tools.description: Get all mailboxes with counts and metadata.

tools.name: get_mailbox
tools.description: Get mailbox by ID with current counts.

tools.name: get_thread
tools.description: Get conversation thread with all related emails.

tools.name: get_email_threads
tools.description: List threads in a specific mailbox.

tools.name: contacts_get_contacts
tools.description: Get contacts list with pagination.

tools.description: Get a specific contact by ID.

tools.description: Add a new contact.

tools.description: Edit a contact's fields.

tools.description: Delete a contact.

tools.name: contacts_search_contacts
tools.description: Search contacts by name, phone, or email.

tools.name: contacts_show_data
tools.description: Show raw contacts data.

tools.description: Return active pipeline loans with dashboard fields.

tools.name: mortgage_los_get_pipeline_summary
tools.description: Return aggregate pipeline metrics.

tools.description: Search loans by borrower name, loan number, property address, or lender.

tools.description: Create a new loan from application data.

tools.name: mortgage_los_get_loan_by_id
tools.description: Get full loan detail by internal loan ID.

tools.name: mortgage_los_update_loan
tools.description: Update mutable loan fields and apply side effects.

tools.name: mortgage_los_get_loan
tools.description: Get full loan detail by loan number.

tools.description: Search borrowers by name, email, or status.

tools.description: Get borrower profile by ID.

tools.description: Update borrower profile fields.

tools.description: Get borrower profile by email.

tools.description: List conditions for a loan.

tools.name: mortgage_los_add_condition
tools.description: Add a new underwriting condition to a loan.

tools.name: mortgage_los_update_condition
tools.description: Update a condition status and notes.

tools.name: mortgage_los_get_documents
tools.description: List document checklist items for a loan.

tools.name: mortgage_los_update_document
tools.description: Update document status, file path, and notes.

tools.description: Return required/requested documents across active loans.

tools.name: mortgage_los_get_milestones
tools.description: Return stage transition history for a loan.

tools.name: mortgage_los_get_activity_log
tools.description: Return loan activity in reverse chronological order.

tools.name: mortgage_los_add_activity
tools.description: Add a note or event to a loan activity feed.

tools.description: Return loans with approaching/missed LE/CD deadlines and expiring rate locks.

tools.name: mortgage_los_get_rate_lock_status

tools.description: Get a staff member by ID.

tools.description: List all files and directories in the filesystem (recursive). Supports
